params.deposits: Array of token amounts to deposit
params.isLive: Whether this is a production broadcast (true) or test broadcast (false)
params.maxFeeBudget: The maximum fee budget the sender is willing to pay (0 to use paymaster)

returns.broadcastId: The unique identifier for this broadcast

cancelBroadcast(bytes32).details: Automatically refunds all payment tokens used in the broadcast

params.broadcastId: The unique identifier of the broadcast to cancel

fundIntent(bytes32,address,bytes32).details: Only callable by the Chainrails coordinator contract

params.broadcastId: The unique identifier of the broadcast
params.broadcastedIntentHash: Hash of the broadcast intent parameters to verify integrity
params.intentAddress: The intent contract address to transfer funds to

returns.executed: True if the broadcast has been executed, false otherwise

markBroadcastExecuted(bytes32).details: Only callable by the Chainrails coordinator contract

params.broadcastId: The unique identifier of the broadcast

broadcastIntent((uint8,uint8,(bytes32,ui.notice: Broadcasts a Chainrails intent and escrows funds

cancelBroadcast(bytes32).notice: Allows initiator to cancel a broadcast and retrieve escrowed funds

fundIntent(bytes32,address,bytes32).notice: Transfers escrowed funds from broadcaster to intent contract

getBroadcastExecutionStatus(bytes32).notice: Returns whether a broadcast has been executed

getEscrowedAmount(bytes32).notice: Returns the total escrowed amount for a specific broadcast across all tokens
